title: Henry Cavill’s Wolverine Returns 2 Years Later In New Marvel Release
summary: After making his debut in the Marvel Cinematic Universe in 2024's Deadpool & Wolverine, Henry Cavill's variant is finally returning 2 years later.
imageAlt: Henry Cavill’s Wolverine Returns 2 Years Later In New Marvel Release

fullArticle:
Henry Cavill's Wolverine is making a big return.

One of Hasbro's upcoming Marvel Legends releases will feature a figure for Cavill's iteration of the iconic X-Men character, following his memorable Deadpool & Wolverine cameo. Check it out below:...
